result.stdout:
Usage:  [options]

Options:
  -?|-h|--help               Show help information
  -v|--version               VS version number (e.g. 15.7). If none specified will get the latest one.
  -p|--solution-folder-path  Solution root folder. If none specified will get current folder.
  -s|--solution-file-name    Solution exact file name. If none specified will get the first found.
  --sudo                     Start Visual Studio as Administrator.

commands.payload:
Usage:  [options]

Options:
  -?|-h|--help               Show help information
  -v|--version               VS version number (e.g. 15.7). If none specified will get the latest one.
  -p|--solution-folder-path  Solution root folder. If none specified will get current folder.
  -s|--solution-file-name    Solution exact file name. If none specified will get the first found.
  --sudo                     Start Visual Studio as Administrator.
